scripts.start: concurrently --names "PRODUCTS,CUSTOMERS,ORDERS,PAYMENTS,GATEWAY" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,red,magenta" "npm start --prefix product-service" "npm start --prefix customer-service" "npm start --prefix order-service" "npm start --prefix payment-service" "npm start --prefix api-gateway"
scripts.start:all: concurrently --names "PRODUCTS,CUSTOMERS,ORDERS,PAYMENTS,GATEWAY,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,red,magenta,cyan" "npm start --prefix product-service" "npm start --prefix customer-service" "npm start --prefix order-service" "npm start --prefix payment-service" "npm start --prefix api-gateway" "npm start --prefix frontend"
